title: R-0019: 87A rebate does not apply — income ₹13L exceeds New Regime limit
notes: Income ₹13L > ₹12L rebate limit under New Regime. No rebate applies to either regime. This is a common taxpayer confusion point — income ₹13L effectively attracts significantly more tax than ₹12L because the rebate is lost entirely (marginal effect). There is no partial rebate — it is cliff-edge at ₹12L.
